items.title: Fix arrow/comment parsing in proposal-to-backlog.ts (line 68)
items.description: Core parsing logic in proposal-to-backlog.ts directly affects how the autonomous loop ingests and converts proposals into backlog items. A defect here corrupts every downstream cycle. Fixing it unblocks item 4 in the same file and ensures clean input to the scorer.

items.title: Fix '-->' exclusion in proposal-to-backlog.ts output (line 214)
items.description: Directly related to the sibling TODO at line 68 in the same file; both address malformed arrow syntax leaking into parsed output. Must run after rank-1 to avoid merge conflicts on the same source region. Combined, the two fixes harden the proposal ingestion path.

items.title: Add one-sentence autonomous loop description to smoke-test spec
items.description: Trivial effort (one sentence) but improves onboarding clarity for the smoke-test spec. Useful before new contributors or automated reviewers read the spec. No code risk whatsoever; high confidence, lowest cost in the sprint.

items.title: Document autonomous loop behavior in plans/2026-04-06-autonomous-loop-part2.md
items.description: Plan-file documentation of the autonomous loop's plan-execute-test-commit cycle is valuable for audit and onboarding but carries no execution risk and does not unblock any other item. Lowest priority because plan files are historical artifacts; a stale or incomplete description here has minimal operational impact compared to the parsing bugs above.
